Description: IFC-311 reassign UI wiring follow-up (contacts + accounts) — wire the four new tRPC procedures shipped by IFC-311 (api.contact.reassign, api.contact.bulkReassign, api.account.reassign, api.account.bulkReassign) into real UI so the notifyOnOwnerChange Cat-1 toggle is reachable for end users on both entities. Source: IFC-311 post-completion code review Finding 1 — all four procedures are dead-on-arrival at runtime (zero direct UI callers). The account SINGLE-reassign path is transitively reachable via AccountDetail.tsx:152 → api.account.assignOwner (refactored in IFC-311 to delegate to performAccountReassign, so the notification fires), but api.account.bulkReassign is fully orphaned and the account detail page still calls the legacy name. Scope: (a) contacts-list bulk-actions bar exposes a Reassign action that calls contact.bulkReassign; (b) contact detail page actions expose a Reassign option that calls contact.reassign; (c) accounts-list bulk-actions bar exposes a Reassign action that calls account.bulkReassign (brand-new UI surface — no legacy shim covers this); (d) migrate AccountDetail.tsx:152 from api.account.assignOwner.useMutation to api.account.reassign.useMutation so the canonical IFC-311 name is the production caller (assignOwner stays as a deprecated legacy alias); (e) one integration test per entity that exercises the toggle flipping the notification path end-to-end. Backend API surface is already shipped by IFC-311 — this task is UI + wiring + one cosmetic endpoint migration only.
Definition of Done: api.contact.reassign + api.contact.bulkReassign + api.account.reassign + api.account.bulkReassign each have >=1 production UI caller in apps/web/src; contacts-list bulk-actions Reassign calls contact.bulkReassign with selected ids + target owner; contact detail Reassign calls contact.reassign; accounts-list bulk-actions Reassign calls account.bulkReassign; AccountDetail.tsx migrated from account.assignOwner to account.reassign (canonical); two integration tests (one per entity) verify both parties receive the matching *_reassigned notification when notifyOnOwnerChange=true; Lighthouse >=90 on contacts-list and accounts-list
KPIs: All 4 new procedures reachable from >=1 UI surface; 2 integration tests pass; Cat-1 wiring proof: rg api.(contact|account).(reassign|bulkReassign) apps/web/src returns >=4 distinct hits; Coverage >=90%

Description: Real inbox integration - contact.draftReply real-thread resolver. IFC-312 audit fix F5 follow-up: the draftReply procedure currently requires the client to supply a full emailThread array (server returns PRECONDITION_FAILED otherwise). IFC-313 replaces this with a server-side resolver that takes input.emailThreadId and fetches the actual ContactEmailThread history (pending real inbox ingestion infra - to be scoped separately). Keep the client-supplied emailThread path as a fallback for power users / integrations.
Definition of Done: contact.draftReply resolves emailThreadId to real thread messages when supplied; client-supplied emailThread remains as fallback; zero placeholder drafts persisted in production; regression on IFC-312 assertions; scoped coverage >=90%
KPIs: Draft generation uses real thread context when emailThreadId resolvable; Coverage >=90%

Description: CRM-to-portal delivery & billing sync (Leangency 14-day flow). On deal-won, provision the portal tenant + push initial delivery state, then mirror billing as it changes. Adds SetupInstalment model + DeliveryTier enum + tenantSlug on Opportunity; Stripe invoice create/finalize for the 3x GBP167 Setup fee (D0/7/14); StripeSubscription persistence on customer.subscription.* webhooks; a PortalDeliverySync service that POSTs /api/internal/tenants then /api/internal/delivery via the domain_events outbox; extends CloseDealWonUseCase; registers a deal_won_enriched handler in events-worker; adds a daily portal-delivery-sweep BullMQ job in ai-worker; and verifies the Stripe webhook signature (handleSubscriptionWebhook moved off tRPC).
Pre-requisites: FILE:packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma;FILE:apps/api/src/modules/billing/billing.router.ts;FILE:apps/workers/events-worker/src/main.ts;FILE:apps/ai-worker/src/ai-worker.ts;FILE:docs/architecture/adr/ADR-065-crm-portal-delivery-sync.md;ENV:LEANGENCY_PORTAL_INTERNAL_URL + PORTAL_INTERNAL_SECRET (Railway);POLICY:portal owns delivery phase/clock - CRM mirrors billing only
Definition of Done: SetupInstalment + DeliveryTier + tenantSlug on Opportunity (migration applied); Stripe adapter createInvoiceItem/createInvoice/finalizeInvoice; StripeSubscription persisted on customer.subscription.*; PortalDeliverySync POSTs provision + delivery via the domain_events outbox; CloseDealWonUseCase creates 3 instalments + finalises instalment-1 + enqueues the push; events-worker handles opportunity.deal_won_enriched; ai-worker runs a daily portal-delivery-sweep job; handleSubscriptionWebhook verifies the Stripe signature; artifacts: packages/db, packages/adapters, packages/application, apps/api, apps/workers/events-worker, apps/ai-worker; targets: >=90% scoped coverage, idempotent push; verified by: pnpm typecheck/test/lint/build + pre-ship
KPIs: Idempotent at-least-once portal push (outbox); instalments D0/7/14; Stripe webhook signature-verified; Coverage >=90%

Description: Standardize attestation provenance fields (exec-attestation emits; schema declares; exec-preflight gate enforces; orchestrator DoD requires)
Definition of Done: exec-attestation always writes a provenance block (spec_session_consensus, plan_reviewer_verdict, plan_reviewer_agent, plan_reviewer_marker, spec_path, plan_path); attestation Zod+JSON schema declares those 6 fields as OPTIONAL with zero new corpus failures; new tools/scripts/exec-preflight/check-attestation-provenance.mjs BLOCKs on missing or non-affirmative provenance and is wired into the exec preflight gate list; orchestrator.md DoD requires the fields; vitest covers the gate; ADR-068 documents the decision; verified by the gate vitest test passing and validate-schemas failure count unchanged from baseline
KPIs: Gate blocks a provenance-less attestation (proven by vitest); skill template includes the provenance block; 0 historical attestations newly broken (validate-schemas failure count == baseline)
